description: LLM response de-obfuscation ground truth cases

test_cases.description: Simple token restoration — all tokens echoed by LLM
test_cases.llm_response: Patient [PII_NAME_a3f2c1d4] (MRN: [PHI_MRN_5e8b2d1a]) has a diagnosis of [PHI_DIAGNOSIS_2c8a4d7b] and is prescribed [PHI_MEDICATION_9f1a3e2b].
test_cases.expected_output: Patient Dr. Eleanor Hartwell (MRN: MRN-7293847) has a diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus and is prescribed Metformin 500mg.
Dr. Eleanor Hartwell's diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus was confirmed on March 14, 1972.

test_cases.description: Vault miss — token not in vault
test_cases.llm_response: The patient [PII_NAME_FFFFFFFF] should follow up with [PII_NAME_a3f2c1d4].
test_cases.expected_output: The patient [UNAVAILABLE] should follow up with Dr. Eleanor Hartwell.

test_cases.description: Non-PII text preservation — surrounding text must be unchanged
test_cases.llm_response: The patient [PII_NAME_a3f2c1d4] has shown improvement. Blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Follow-up in 3 weeks.
test_cases.expected_output: The patient Dr. Eleanor Hartwell has shown improvement. Blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Follow-up in 3 weeks.

test_cases.description: Multiple tokens of same type in one response
test_cases.expected_output: Account 4532-1234-5678-9012 belongs to Dr. Eleanor Hartwell (SSN: 543-67-8901).

test_cases.description: Response with zero tokens — no PII in LLM output
test_cases.llm_response: The patient's blood pressure reading is within normal range. No further action is required at this time.
test_cases.expected_output: The patient's blood pressure reading is within normal range. No further action is required at this time.

test_cases.description: Token at start and end of response
test_cases.llm_response: [PII_NAME_a3f2c1d4] was the subject of this assessment. All records are stored under [PHI_MRN_5e8b2d1a].
test_cases.expected_output: Dr. Eleanor Hartwell was the subject of this assessment. All records are stored under MRN-7293847.
